name: mibaldi-agent-hub
description: Web/PWA privada para gestionar hosts remotos, terminales tmux persistentes y agentes (Claude Code, Codex, etc.)

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
